name: Quantum Tank
short_description: The 3D version of Tank Battle introduces many unique gameplay features.
detailed_description:
"Quantum Tanks" combines 3D, top-down shooting, and classic tank battle gameplay. Use agile maneuvering to defeat all enemy tanks and clear the levels.

Key Features:

  • Unique shell interception mechanic: You can fire shells to detonate enemy shells.

  • If a tank's shell is detonated at close range, it will also deal damage to the tank itself.

  • Seven carefully designed maps.

  • No health pickups in the maps—only various types of cover. The satisfaction of defeating powerful enemies is a key highlight.

  • All enemies are equipped with high-level AI systems. They automatically seek your position and fire shells at the right moment.

  • Each time you start a level, enemy tanks will patrol in different patterns, providing a fresh experience every time you play.

Game Controls — "W, S" control the forward and backward movement of the tank, "A, D" control the rotation of the tank, hold the left mouse button to control the firing position, and release it to fire the shell.
